lines.speaker: Caritta
lines.text: Hello! You're not from around here, are you? It's exciting to see that even people from outside of Varlamore are looking to join the Emissaries!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well after I heard about all the good work they were doing, I could hardly say no! What about you? What made you want to join them?

lines.speaker: Caritta
lines.text: Well it's our duty of course! The Church of Ralos has become lost, but the Emissaries know the truth. Ximoua will not come to be unless we make it so!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're quite eager to see the end of the world then?

lines.speaker: Caritta
lines.text: End? Ximoua is no end! It is the beginning! We will all come together as one and bring about a new world! I can't wait!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I'm glad to see you're so excited. Good luck with the tests.
